title: Caesar Watches His Weapon Move

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ahhhh!! This is him right here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why the hell are you so stubborn

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This guy really is a massive pain......

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yeah, we know you can't swim!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15

summary: Caesar Watches His Weapon Move. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
